name: Betaine
summary: Betaine is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on general biological context. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around limited source-backed mechanism signals, not treatment claims.

safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
